title: Onomatopoeia
description: Adds dynamic comic-style sound effects (onomatopoeias) for visual flair.
body:
# Onomatopoeia

Onomatopoeia adds animated, floating text to the world to represent sounds and dramatic moments—bringing visual flair to explosions, combat, and more.

## 🔊 Sound Effects:
- _BOOM!_ for explosions
- _POW!_, _WHACK!_ during combat
- _hmmmm..._ for villager ambience
- _boing_ when bouncing on slime
- _CRACK!_ for lightning

**And many more, with smooth animated effects**

These comic-style popups make every action more intense and expressive—without straying from the vanilla feel.

## 🎬 Narrative Events:
Occasionally, rare cinematic lines will appear during special in-game events:
- "Fate blinked, and spared you."
- "The ground recoiled in terror."
- "From the dark, it emerged..."

These add surprise, mystery, and storytelling to gameplay in a lightweight, immersive way.

## 🎨 Why Use It?

This mod enhances combat, exploration, and ambiance with personality and charm—perfect for players who enjoy visual feedback, roleplay, or cinematic experiences.

✅ Lightweight, **client-side**

✅ Vanilla style

✅ Actively developed - feedback welcome!
